content:
God of Slaughter

Chapter 1579 - Smelting

Flows of terrifying aura emitted from Cloud Mist Territory hovered in the air and shook every soul in this territory.

Many people were relocated to Heavenly Rock Continent or the other life stars around from the former holy land of Cloud Tribe. The experts like Ming Hao, Xuan He, Emperor Sea Shark, Sha Zhao, Shang Chen, and the others were working unceasingly to help their fellows moving out of this place.

In the misty sea of clouds, Hiro, Han Tian, Judy, and Montecie were watching Grace Mainland and discussing in low voices.

On Grace Mainland, Shi Yan was like an ancient Demogorgon as he appeared in his Absolute Beginning body. The fierce, overbearing aura that was emitted made every creature shiver in fear.

Shi Yan's Absolute Beginning body was like a massive shadow cast over Grace Mainland that covered all the light from the sky.

His body was like a colossal mountain. The suns, moons, and stars sparkled in his eyes, which were deep and twinkling like the immense universe. His iron-like body was covered in thick scale armor, which was naturally connected to his skins and flesh. Bone spikes grew from his bones like so many sharp swords and flashed coldly.

"What an amazing Absolute Beginning body! The immense quantity of his Blood Qi has shaken everyone's soul," said Gay of the White Bone Clan as he was eyeing Shi Yan's body.

"It's the real Absolute Beginning body. Sigh, I'm far behind this..." Forefather Dragon Lizard sounded emotional.

When the last group of mortals left the place, Ming Hao, Xuan He, and Frederick sent the soul message to Shi Yan and reported to him that no creature was left on Grace Mainland.

Many cities, countries, and mountains of pellets and materials were teleported away from Grace Mainland by the experts' supernatural abilities.

At this moment, Grace Mainland was vast with forests and rivers scattered like blood veins everywhere. However, there was no creature and no sign of a country or life.

However, looking at this life star, no one would have thought that it was barren as they all felt the immense and vigorous energy on this planet. The energy fluctuations here were so powerful.

All warriors of Cloud Mist Territory were arranged to stay pretty far away from this area; they couldn't see Shi Yan's giant figure.

While I'm melting Grace Mainland, you guys seal the entire territory. Don't let any Soul Consciousness intrude," Shi Yan hovered above the continent, his voice like thunderclaps.

Hiro, Han Tian, and the others nodded.

Shi Yan didn't say more.

Swoosh! Swoosh! Swoosh! Swoosh!

His beautiful, colossal soul altar arose from his head like an unfolding roll of picture.

Underneath the borderless Sea of Consciousness emitted the energy that could cover the entire world. The soul pond in the center wasn't small anymore, the crystal clear soul energy murmuring.

The tier of power Upanishad was above the Sea of Consciousness with the Space Imprint that was like a prism. The Star Imprint was like a galaxy, the Life Imprint was like a Light Ball, and the Devouring Imprint was like a black hole. The eight evil powers appeared as the eight islands...

The space above that tier was a chaotic area, which was Shi Yan's territory.

That territory seemed to be concealed by a block of blurry air, which hindered people from seeing what was inside. However, when they used their souls to sense, they felt an infinitely mysterious feeling as if their souls had just touched a window to another universe. They felt that they had sensed the magical power of creation.

Everybody exchanged looks. They couldn't hide the fear on their faces. They knew Shi Yan's territory was magical with endless secrets.

The two identical souls, which looked like Shi Yan's real body, hovered above the chaotic territory. They were like twins. The soul mist emitted from them and gathered by the chaotic territory.

Among the two souls, the host soul looked blurry and it had the same shade with the turbulent territory. The Power Upanishad Symbol Tower floated above the co-soul and slowly moved as if it would never cease. It was strange to the eyes, indeed.

As the experts were watching him, Shi Yan closed his eyes. However, his host soul's eyes still opened. The light in his eyes shot like meteors toward Grace Mainland.

All of a sudden, a five-colored sea of flames emerged from under the co-soul. That sea of flames had auras of the flames from the Origin. It expanded and flew out of the soul altar, aimed at Grace Mainland.

BOOM!

Shortly after, the entire Grace Mainland was covered in the five-colored flame sea. The auras of the heaven flames merged with Shi Yan's soul energy and Soul Consciousness, shrouding the entire continent.

Magically, the heaven flames were burning Grace Mainland. However, they didn't burn the forest, crack the ground, or dry the seas. Although it was so scorching that Judy, Han Tian, and the others could feel the terrifying heat, it didn't destroy the natural landscapes of the continent.

The sea of flames had turned Grace Mainland into a massive, burning globe. The horrible flames shot out everywhere and burned the void.

The surrounding temperature rocketed. DeCarlos, Adeles, and the other low-realm experts couldn't resist the heat waves. They had to move backward and hover far from the scene.

"Seal the territory!" Shi Yan's soul message filled the entire territory and made all the experts in this place receive it.

Han Tian, Hiro, and Montecie exchanged looks. They immediately took action, strengthening all the territory barriers and concealing the territory entirely. No wisp of Soul Consciousness could intrude this territory.

"You're a little wanton. If you want to refine Desolate's clone, you should tell me first." Right when they were about to take action, Zi Yao's voice came from deep in the sea of clouds underneath. "You're lucky that I got it when you started. Yeah, I'm here to help. Even if Desolate knows what you want to do now, he can't affect you."

Everybody was stunned and they all looked at the clouds under their feet.

Zi Yao, who had disappeared for years, slowly emerged from Mist Territory underneath. She was still dazzlingly gorgeous. At this moment, the light in her eyes was so terrifying.

During the recent ten years, she had cultivated ascetically in Mist Territory under Cloud Mist Territory. Cloud Mist Territory was formed by Cloud Territory and Mist Territory. The layers of clouds supported Cloud Territory while the continent down there was Mist Territory.

Walking out from Mist Territory, Zi Yao gave a faint smile as the snake mark on her forehead vibrated strangely.

Shortly after, billions of seven-colored divine light bands turned into countless snakes with consciousness expandin to the entire territory and guarding every barrier.

The entire Cloud Mist Territory had become brilliant with so many colors. It looked like millions of fireworks exploded at the same time. The scene was so beautiful that it made people feel they were dreaming.

Seven-colored halos appeared and covered the entire territory, sinking each planet of this territory in rainbow bands and auspicious clouds. It was strikingly marvelous, indeed.

Just like a miracle!

Han Tian, Hiro, Montecie, and the others could feel the changes of the territory and the intimidating energy released by Zi Yao alone. They were all frightened.

Soon, they recognized that after thirty years staying silent, Zi Yao was much stronger than she used to be in the battle against Yuan Zu in Volcano Cloud Sea.

"I know you won't stay idle down there. You can take action to help me in any minute. It seems like your power is almost recovered," Shi Yan grinned and watched Zi Yao floating up. "If you weren't here, I wouldn't dare to do it so early. I would have waited until I reachedThird Sky of Territory Ancestor realm to refine this clone of Desolate."

"Then why didn't you wait a little more? If you reach Third Sky of Territory Ancestor Realm, even without me here, you can successfully melt his clone. It will reduce the risk to the lowest level," said Zi Yao with a frown.

"He won't give me much more time..."

Shi Yan pondered for a while, his eyes like a moving galaxy. He looked in a direction, his eyes piercing through all space barriers to reach the mysterious area. "I can't feel his whereabouts, but the pressure he puts on me never subsided. I think he prepared well. He will come to me soon. I don't have much time left..."

Hearing him, Zi Yao put on a stern face. She knew how bold Desolate was more than anyone else. Thus, she understood Shi Yan's worries.

"Alright, do it now. We will join hands. I think we can stop his furious attack." Zi Yao didn't dare to linger. "As he wasn't here yet, he should have something he was afraid of. You should seize the chance and refine his body. If you can take this energy, when you face him, you will have the power to counter..."

Her face turned solemn. She took a deep breath and then asked Hiro, Han Tian, and Montecie, "Listen, go and guard the big barriers of this territory. Follow my lead to strengthen the barrier. Don't act alone. Otherwise, we can't promote and use your power to the acme."

"Hiro, you go East. Using the Metal power to increase the thickness of the barrier. Use the metal rocks of the three continents around to create a metal wall!"

"Han Tian, go South. It's a burning area with so many volcanos. It's suitable for your power to be maximized there. Remember to gather all of your energy to control the surrounding flames and create a sea of fire. Whenever you spot a wisp of intruding Soul Consciousness, tell me immediately. Don't attack it!"

". . ."

Zi Yao wasn't trying to be polite. She ordered Hiro, Han Tian, Montecie, Judy, Forefather Dragon Lizard, Gay, Dracula, and Mei Ji to guard different locations where there might be not enough defense. They had to use their different powers to strengthen the defense.

To prevent Desolate's interruption, she was more cautious than ever. She didn't look at ease as when she faced Yuan Zu.

Han Tian's group trusted her competence. No one offended her assignment. All acted as they were told. They immediately dashed away to different areas as she assigned them to use their energy to guide the natural forces and strengthen the barrier.

After a while, Zi Yao turned to Shi Yan and hissed, "You can start now!"
